heading: Contracts not affected
label: 14 Contracts not affected
text: This title shall not apply to contracts made prior to .January 1, 1926
notes: Prior Provisions, , former provisions of relating to “short title” is not now covered.Act Feb. 12, 1925, ch. 213, § 1443 Stat. 886section 14 of this title
